parameters.query:
=WITH preferred AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(NULLIF(store_id, 0), id) AS store_id,
    store_name,
    onboarding_step,
    upi_id,
    delivery_area,
    operating_hours,
    owner_whatsapp_number,
    COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM public.inventory i WHERE i.store_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(public.stores.store_id, 0), public.stores.id)), 0) AS inventory_count
  FROM public.stores
  WHERE regexp_replace(COALESCE(owner_whatsapp_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace('{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
     OR (
       {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0
       AND (store_id = {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} OR id = {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }})
     )
  ORDER BY CASE
    WHEN {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND store_id = {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} THEN 0
    WHEN {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND id = {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} THEN 1
    WHEN regexp_replace(COALESCE(owner_whatsapp_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace('{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g') THEN 2
    ELSE 2
  END,
  COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) DESC,
  COALESCE(store_id, id, 0) DESC,
  created_at DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
)
, lang_pref AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(language, 'en') AS user_language, true AS has_explicit_lang
  FROM public.customer_preferences
  WHERE chat_id = {{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  preferred.*,
  COALESCE((SELECT user_language FROM lang_pref), 'en') AS user_language,
  COALESCE((SELECT has_explicit_lang FROM lang_pref), false) AS has_language_pref
FROM preferred;

=WITH preferred AS (
  SELECT ctid, id, COALESCE(NULLIF(store_id, 0), id) AS store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours, owner_whatsapp_number
  FROM public.stores
  WHERE regexp_replace(COALESCE(owner_whatsapp_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
     OR (
       {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0
       AND (store_id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} OR id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }})
     )
  ORDER BY CASE
    WHEN {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND store_id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} THEN 0
    WHEN {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} THEN 1
    WHEN regexp_replace(COALESCE(owner_whatsapp_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g') THEN 2
    ELSE 2
  END,
  COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) DESC,
  COALESCE(store_id, id, 0) DESC,
  created_at DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
), updated AS (
  UPDATE public.stores s
  SET owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}',
      store_id = s.id,
      onboarding_step = CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(s.onboarding_step, 0) < 1 THEN 1
        ELSE s.onboarding_step
      END
  WHERE s.ctid = (SELECT ctid FROM preferred)
  RETURNING id, store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours, owner_whatsapp_number
), inserted_raw AS (
  INSERT INTO public.stores (owner_whatsapp_number, store_name, owner_telegram_chat_id, onboarding_step, created_at)
  SELECT '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', 'Pending store ' || RIGHT('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', 4), 0, 1, NOW()
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM preferred)
  RETURNING ctid
), inserted AS (
  UPDATE public.stores s
  SET store_id = s.id
  WHERE s.ctid = (SELECT ctid FROM inserted_raw)
  RETURNING id, store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours, owner_whatsapp_number
)
SELECT * FROM updated
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM inserted;

=WITH preferred AS (
  SELECT ctid
  FROM public.stores
  WHERE regexp_replace(COALESCE(owner_whatsapp_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
     OR (
       {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0
       AND (store_id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} OR id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }})
     )
  ORDER BY CASE
    WHEN {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND store_id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} THEN 0
    WHEN {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} THEN 1
    WHEN regexp_replace(COALESCE(owner_whatsapp_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g') THEN 2

  END,

UPDATE public.stores s
SET owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}',
    store_id = s.id,
    store_name = '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_name_input.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    onboarding_step = 2
WHERE s.ctid = (SELECT ctid FROM preferred)
RETURNING store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours, owner_whatsapp_number;

=WITH preferred AS (
  SELECT ctid, id, COALESCE(NULLIF(store_id, 0), id) AS store_id, onboarding_step
  FROM public.stores
  WHERE regexp_replace(COALESCE(owner_whatsapp_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
     OR (
       {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0
       AND (store_id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} OR id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }})
     )
  ORDER BY COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) DESC, COALESCE(store_id, id, 0) DESC, created_at DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
), lang_upsert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.customer_preferences (chat_id, language, updated_at)
  VALUES ('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.lang_code }}', NOW())
  ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE SET language = EXCLUDED.language, updated_at = NOW()
), store_updated AS (
  UPDATE public.stores s
  SET owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}',
      store_id = s.id,
      onboarding_step = CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(s.onboarding_step, 0) < 1 THEN 1
        ELSE s.onboarding_step
      END
  WHERE s.ctid = (SELECT ctid FROM preferred)
  RETURNING id, store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours, owner_whatsapp_number
), inserted_raw AS (
  INSERT INTO public.stores (owner_whatsapp_number, store_name, owner_telegram_chat_id, onboarding_step, created_at)
  SELECT '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', 'Pending store ' || RIGHT('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', 4), 0, 1, NOW()
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM preferred)
  RETURNING ctid
), inserted AS (
  UPDATE public.stores s
  SET store_id = s.id
  WHERE s.ctid = (SELECT ctid FROM inserted_raw)
  RETURNING id, store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours, owner_whatsapp_number
)
SELECT * FROM store_updated
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM inserted;

=WITH existing AS (
  SELECT id, COALESCE(NULLIF(store_id, 0), id) AS store_id, store_name, owner_whatsapp_number, onboarding_step
  FROM public.stores
  WHERE regexp_replace(COALESCE(owner_whatsapp_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
      = regexp_replace('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
  LIMIT 1
), inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO public.stores (owner_whatsapp_number, store_name, owner_telegram_chat_id, onboarding_step, created_at)
  SELECT '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', 'Pending setup', 0, 0, NOW()
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing)
  RETURNING id, COALESCE(NULLIF(store_id, 0), id) AS store_id, store_name, owner_whatsapp_number, onboarding_step
)
SELECT * FROM existing
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM inserted
LIMIT 1;

    upi_id = '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.upi_input.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    onboarding_step = 3
WHERE s.ctid = (SELECT ctid FROM preferred)
RETURNING store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours, owner_whatsapp_number;

=WITH preferred AS (
  SELECT ctid
  FROM public.stores
  WHERE regexp_replace(COALESCE(owner_whatsapp_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
     OR (
       {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0
       AND (store_id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} OR id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }})
     )
  ORDER BY CASE
    WHEN {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND store_id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} THEN 0
    WHEN {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} THEN 1
    WHEN regexp_replace(COALESCE(owner_whatsapp_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g') THEN 2
    ELSE 2
  END,
  COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) DESC,
  COALESCE(store_id, id, 0) DESC,
  created_at DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
)
UPDATE public.stores s
SET owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}',
    store_id = s.id,
    delivery_area = '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.area_input.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    onboarding_step = 4
WHERE s.ctid = (SELECT ctid FROM preferred)

     OR (

RETURNING store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours, owner_whatsapp_number;

=WITH preferred AS (
  SELECT ctid, id, COALESCE(NULLIF(store_id, 0), id) AS store_id, onboarding_step
  FROM public.stores
  WHERE regexp_replace(COALESCE(owner_whatsapp_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
     OR (
       {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0
       AND (store_id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }} OR id = {{ Number($('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.store_id || 0) }})
     )
  ORDER BY COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) DESC, COALESCE(store_id, id, 0) DESC, created_at DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
), lang_upsert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.customer_preferences (chat_id, language, updated_at)
  VALUES ('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.lang_code }}', NOW())
  ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE SET language = EXCLUDED.language, updated_at = NOW()
), store_updated AS (
  UPDATE public.stores s
  SET owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}',
      store_id = s.id,
      onboarding_step = CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(s.onboarding_step, 0) < 1 THEN 1
        ELSE s.onboarding_step
      END
  WHERE s.ctid = (SELECT ctid FROM preferred)
  RETURNING id, store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours, owner_whatsapp_number
), inserted_raw AS (
  INSERT INTO public.stores (owner_whatsapp_number, store_name, owner_telegram_chat_id, onboarding_step, created_at)
  SELECT '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', 'Pending store ' || RIGHT('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', 4), 0, 1, NOW()
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM preferred)
  RETURNING ctid
), inserted AS (
  UPDATE public.stores s
  SET store_id = s.id
  WHERE s.ctid = (SELECT ctid FROM inserted_raw)
  RETURNING id, store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours, owner_whatsapp_number
)
SELECT * FROM store_updated
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM inserted;

=WITH existing AS (
  SELECT id, COALESCE(NULLIF(store_id, 0), id) AS store_id, store_name, owner_whatsapp_number, onboarding_step
  FROM public.stores
  WHERE regexp_replace(COALESCE(owner_whatsapp_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
      = regexp_replace('{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
  LIMIT 1
), inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO public.stores (owner_whatsapp_number, store_name, owner_telegram_chat_id, onboarding_step, created_at)
  SELECT '{{ $('Decide Onboarding Route').first().json.chat_id }}', 'Pending setup', 0, 0, NOW()
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing)
  RETURNING id, COALESCE(NULLIF(store_id, 0), id) AS store_id, store_name, owner_whatsapp_number, onboarding_step
)
SELECT * FROM existing
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM inserted
LIMIT 1;
